title: Generating a Correct Inorder Tree Traversal
scenario: Given the root node of a binary tree, generate a recursive function to perform an inorder tree traversal. The function should return a list of node values in the correct inorder traversal order. Ensure the function handles trees with empty child nodes.
constraints: Must include a base case for handling empty child nodes
Must use a recursive approach to traverse the tree

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the function correctly perform an inorder tree traversal?
Is the code well-structured and easy to follow?
Is the base case correctly handled for empty child nodes?
Is recursion used to traverse the tree?
